| Query | Covers |
|---|---|

## FHIR Queries — PheKB Autoimmune Umbrella Phenotype

### Per-Category Queries (One per Autoimmune Disease)

**1. Rheumatoid Arthritis (Rheumatology) — ICD-10-CM M05.x, M06.x**
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M05,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M06
```

**2. Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (Rheumatology) — ICD-10-CM M32.x**
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M32
```

**3. Crohn's Disease (Gastroenterology) — ICD-10-CM K50.x**
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K50
```

**4. Multiple Sclerosis (Neurology) — ICD-10-CM G35**
```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|G35
```

**5. Type 1 Diabetes Mellitus (Endocrinology) — ICD-10-CM E10.x**
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|E10
```

---

### Combined Single Cross-System Condition Query (PheKB Umbrella)
All five autoimmune categories unified via comma-separated OR logic with `:below` hierarchy traversal:
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M05,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M06,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M32,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K50,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|G35,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|E10
```

With patient resource inclusion for direct patient identification:
```
Condition?code:below=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M05,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M06,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M32,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|K50,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|G35,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|E10&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

### Design Notes

| Category | Parent Code | `:below` Captures |
|---|---|---|
| Rheumatoid Arthritis | M05, M06 | M05.0–M06.9 (seropositive, seronegative, juvenile variants) |
| SLE | M32 | M32.0–M32.9 (drug-induced, with organ involvement) |
| Crohn's Disease | K50 | K50.00–K50.919 (small bowel, large bowel, combinations) |
| Multiple Sclerosis | G35 | Leaf-level code; no children; `:below` = exact match |
| Type 1 DM | E10 | E10.1–E10.9 (all complication subtypes) |

- **`:below` modifier** leverages ICD-10-CM hierarchy to avoid enumerating every 7-character code manually
- **Comma-separated values** within a single `code` parameter implement FHIR OR logic across all systems simultaneously
- **`_include=Condition:subject`** pulls referenced `Patient` resources in a single bundle for cohort identification consistent with PheKB case-finding workflows

### What this query does and how to apply the temporal filter

| Layer | What happens |
|---|---|
| **FHIR query** | Returns every `Condition` record matching any of **~148 ICD-10-CM autoimmune codes** across 9 disease families, sorted by patient for efficient streaming |
| **Client Step 1** | Group all returned records by **(patient_id, exact ICD-10-CM code)** — "same condition" = exact same code |
| **Client Step 2** | For each group, extract all dates using `onsetDateTime` (preferred) → fall back to `recordedDate` |
| **Client Step 3** | Deduplicate to **distinct calendar dates** (yyyy-MM-dd only) |
| **Client Step 4** | **Keep the group if:** `count(distinct_dates) ≥ 3` **AND** `(max_date − min_date) ≥ 7 days` |
| **Client Step 5** | Return the union of all patients that satisfy at least one passing group |

**Code families covered (server-verified):**

| Disease Family | Codes | Verified Count |
|---|---|---|
| Systemic autoimmune (SLE, Sjögren, SSc, vasculitis, PM/DM…) | M30–M36 (84 codes, VSAC Joint Commission OID 2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1029.311) | 183 |
| Rheumatoid arthritis (seropositive + seronegative) | M05–M06 | 252 |
| IBD (Crohn's + UC) | K50, K51 | 232 |
| Neurological (MS, NMO, demyelinating, GBS, myasthenia gravis) | G35–G3
